description: Upper SoleWhite leather upperThis slip-on sneaker consists of Puma’s signature side stripe in black on one sideThe closure is a zig zag black velcro strapBrand name appliqued on the strap as well as on the back of the collarMidsoleCushioned midsole for comfort and stabilityOutsoleRubber outsole with an upraised heel for enhanced tractionEmbedded Puma Jumping cat embedded on the rubber outsole
